settings.hero_subheading: The research gap is real. So is this formula.
settings.story_heading: The healthcare system was not built with Black women in mind.
settings.mission: To close the wellness gap for Black women through evidence-informed supplementation and radical transparency.
settings.values_heading: Radical transparency. Evidence first. Chosen for you.

settings.content: The healthcare system was not built with Black women in mind. The research gaps, the dismissals, the delayed diagnoses — they are not accidents. They are the result of decades of systemic exclusion from clinical trials, medical education, and supplement formulation.

For Her Throne exists because that gap is real, documented, and unacceptable. Every product in our line was chosen specifically for the hormonal health challenges that disproportionately affect Black women — challenges that mainstream wellness brands ignore entirely.
This is not a product you were marketed to as an afterthought. We went to the data first. Then we found what addressed it.

settings.title: Evidence first
settings.body: Every ingredient tied to published research. Every stat cited. No wellness theater.

settings.title: Radical transparency
settings.body: Full doses on the label. Full ingredient stories on the site. No proprietary blends hiding what you're actually taking.

settings.title: Chosen for you
settings.body: Not a shelf product repurposed with new packaging. Selected from the data, specifically for Black women's hormonal health.
